response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and a long track record of craftsmanship, testing, and open-source work. However, this is a Director-level Principal Engineer role requiring 15 years of experience with deep, recognized AI/ML expertise and demonstrated AI products or platforms. The resume shows roughly 13-14 years of professional experience, no advanced AI/ML degree, and only recent, peripheral exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — well short of the recognized AI expertise and strategic advisory scope required.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack and infrastructure background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source contributions, workshops, and public talks
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
concerns: No recognized AI/ML expertise or demonstrated AI products/platforms at the scale a Principal AI strategist requires
Career level is senior/staff IC, not director-level; no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product future-state
Experience appears below the 15-year minimum and lacks preferred AI-related Master's/PhD

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI/ML expertise and shipped AI platforms
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC scope (strategy, customer advisory)
Strong engineering craftsmanship and polyglot delivery track record
